_rules.list_name: Must match a list name in config/settings.yaml -> lists
_rules.card_title: Required. Shown on the Trello card.
_rules.labels: Optional. Array of label names matching config/settings.yaml -> labels
_rules.due_date: Optional. ISO 8601 e.g. 2025-06-13. Omit or null if not needed.
_rules.checklist: Optional. Object with a 'title' and 'items' array. Omit if not needed.

description: Outline goals, deliverables, and success criteria for the project.
Initialise version control, CI pipeline, and local dev environment.
Document architecture decisions, data flow, and component boundaries.
Build the primary feature as defined in the technical design document.
Investigate and resolve the reported issue affecting live users.
Review PR for the new authentication module before merging to main.
Completed initial project kickoff meeting with all stakeholders.
